infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Church Attendance to scan member QR codes and update profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Church Attendance to choose profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Church Attendance to save your QR code.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow Church Attendance to send church reminders and alerts.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Church Attendance to unlock your secure session.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Church Attendance to scan QR codes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Church Attendance to choose profile photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Church Attendance to take a profile photo.
